strengths: Robust reporting and dashboarding (Power BI, Tableau)
improvement_bullets: Streamlined operational reporting by building complex Excel VBA macros to automate data reconciliation, reducing manual error rates in quality tracking by 30%.
Partnered with cross-functional leads to perform root-cause analysis on inventory variances, ensuring data integrity and strict adherence to SOX compliance standards.
Developed and migrated data dashboards to Amazon QuickSight, enabling real-time visibility into operational defect trends for warehouse leadership.
Conducted deep-dive research into ICQA defect trends, documenting findings and translating complex data sets into actionable process improvements for operations teams.
Demonstrated ability to thrive in high-paced, high-volume environments, consistently meeting tight deadlines while maintaining physical and operational readiness in warehouse-style workflows.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the ICQA Data Analyst opportunity with Amazon. I am interested in this opportunity because of Amazon’s relentless focus on operational excellence and data-driven decision-making. What interests me about working for Amazon is its approach to innovation and the 'Day 1' philosophy, which inspires me because I am a self-starter who thrives in fast-paced, ambiguous environments where the goal is to optimize complex systems. I believe my expertise in SQL and Python and my background in automated reporting and root-cause analysis would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing data accuracy and cross-functional alignment. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified that manual reporting was causing data mismatches; I developed automated Python workflows and Power BI dashboards that reduced report discrepancies and improved operational efficiency by 40%. Ultimately, I know that the ICQA Data Analyst role at Amazon would allow me to bring my technical automation skills to improve ICQA defect standards and support SOX requirements. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my SOX-adjacent data governance skills. I standardized organizational KPIs and implemented data quality frameworks to ensure a 'single source of truth' for business stakeholders, resulting in significantly higher reliability for strategic decision-making. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in data mining and process improvement in working on ICQA initiatives at Amazon. I know that my analytical rigor and ability to bridge the gap between technical data and business strategy align with what it takes to succeed at the ICQA Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
